title: gbrain #709: Astro files need code sync coverage
summary: For gbrain issue 709 / PR 823, Astro single file components are code inputs. Add .astro to src/core/sync.ts CODE EXTENSIONS, map detectCodeLanguage .astro to html in src/core/chunkers/code.ts, and keep code reference ext
body:
For gbrain issue #709 / PR #823, Astro single-file components are code inputs. Add .astro to src/core/sync.ts CODE_EXTENSIONS, map detectCodeLanguage(.astro) to html in src/core/chunkers/code.ts, and keep code-reference extraction plus fenced-code pseudo paths aligned so synced Astro pages can also receive code-reference edges. Regression tests belong in sync-strategy, sync-walker-symlink, chunkers/code, link-extraction-code-refs, and sync-classifier-widening.
Evidence: Issue https://github.com/garrytan/gbrain/issues/709 and PR https://github.com/garrytan/gbrain/pull/823. Tests passed: bun test test/sync-strategy.test.ts test/sync-walker-symlink.test.ts test/chunkers/code.test.ts test/link-extraction-code-refs.test.ts test/sync-classifier-widening.test.ts, 68 pass 0 fail. Typecheck and git diff --check passed.
Verified by: targeted bun tests, bun run typecheck, git diff --check
